title: hieracium segureum subsp. segureum
intro: Hieracium segureum subsp. segureum, also known as lesser hawk's beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium segureum subsp. segureum include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. Hieracium segureum subsp. segureum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and roots can also be used in herbal remedies.
